creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is some suspect that hugin does not work with wxgtk 2.8.
(crashes just as reported, also happened with hugin 0.6.1).

Can you change this line in Makefile:
USE_WX=         2.6+
to
USE_WX=         2.6

and recompile? I will test this tomorrow and if confirmed will commit
this change.

-- 
Vasil Dimov
moc.elcaro@vomid.lisav        Software Developer @ Oracle/Innobase Oy
gro.DSBeerF@dv                Committer @ FreeBSD.org
gro.d5v@dv                    Home @ Sofia, Bulgaria
